Class BiteTimerListener

java.lang.Object
net.sylphian.minecraft.fishing.listeners.BiteTimerListener
All Implemented Interfaces:
org.bukkit.event.Listener
public class BiteTimerListener extends Object implements org.bukkit.event.Listener
Listener responsible for overriding the vanilla fishing bite timer.

Intercepts the bobber throw event and sets a custom wait time on the FishHook entity based on the configured rarity modifiers and current weather condition. This replaces Minecraft's default random 5–30 second wait with a contextual delay — rarer fish take longer to bite, while storms speed up the process.

Uses the Paper FishHook API to set min/max lure times directly on the hook entity rather than packet manipulation, which is simpler and more reliable for this use case.

    • BiteTimerListener

      public BiteTimerListener(ConfigLoader config, LootManager lootManager, org.bukkit.plugin.java.JavaPlugin plugin)
      Constructs a new BiteTimerListener.
      Parameters:
      config - the config loader providing bite timer settings
      lootManager - the loot manager used to peek at likely rarity
      plugin - the plugin instance for scheduling tasks

  • Method Details

    • onBobberThrow

      public void onBobberThrow(org.bukkit.event.player.PlayerFishEvent event)
      Handles the bobber throw event. Calculates and applies a custom bite delay to the fishing hook based on the current weather and a pre-rolled rarity estimate.
      Parameters:
      event - the fishing event
